name: redis-leakybucket-rate-limiter

metadata.name: redis-leakybucket-rate-limiter
metadata.summary: A simple Redis-based leaky bucket rate limiter

documentation:
# Rate Limiter

A Redis-based Python package implementing the Leaky Bucket algorithm for rate limiting.

## Installation

```bash
pip install .
```

## Test
```bash
docker compose up tests && docker compose down
```

functions.name: tests.test_rate_limiter.rate_limiter
documentation: Fixture to initialize the rate limiter with a Redis client.

functions.name: tests.test_rate_limiter.test_rate_limiter_allows_requests
documentation: Test that the rate limiter allows requests within the limit.

functions.name: tests.test_rate_limiter.test_rate_limiter_blocks_requests
documentation: Test that the rate limiter blocks requests exceeding the limit.

functions.name: tests.test_rate_limiter.test_rate_limiter_leak_rate
documentation: Test that the rate limiter allows requests after enough time has passed.

functions.name: tests.test_rate_limiter.test_rate_limiter_ttl
documentation: Test that the Redis key for the rate limiter is deleted after the TTL expires.

methods.name: ratelimiter.limiter.LeakyBucketRateLimiter.__init__
documentation: Initialize Redis client with SASL authentication.

methods.name: ratelimiter.limiter.LeakyBucketRateLimiter.is_rate_limited
documentation:
Apply the leaky bucket algorithm to limit requests.

```
param identifier

Unique identifier for the client (e.g., IP address)

param capacity

Maximum bucket size

param leak_rate

Leak rate in requests per second

return

True if rate-limited, False otherwise
```
